name: Danish Pea Soup with Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lean Bacon or smoked pork in one piece
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peas in a large kettle and cover with 6 cups of water. Cook slowly, covered, for 1 1/2 hours until tender.
2. Put bacon, carrots, celery root, leeks, onions, thyme, salt, and pepper in another kettle. Cover with water. Cook slowly, covered, for 40 minutes until vegetables and bacon are tender.
3. Remove bacon; slice and keep warm.
4. Remove vegetables and add to cooked split peas, using as much of the cooking broth as desired to thin the soup. Reheat if necessary.
5. Ladle soup into wide soup plates and serve sliced bacon and cooked sausage links separately on a platter.
6. Serve with dark bread, mustard, and beer. Serves 6-8.
